descriptions.text: A halloween-themed side-scrolling platformer for the Nintendo Entertainment System, developed by calgames. Featuring a purple monster named Mister Scary, who is searching for his family.

MISTER SCARY, a purple monster, has lost his family. Make your way through the creepies and crawlies of a strange land to find them!

Conquer 6 scary stages, each with their own sub-areas. Defeat 6 different scary bosses. Stomp on your enemies! Or… eat a scary spicey or icy snack to torch or freeze your foes.

A scary world map guides you through your adventure.

Scary game soundtrack by Logan E. Schad and Kevin Van Der Burg.
